name: motopass
description: MotoPass — Bitcoin Sovereign Passports & Residency Programs. Single source of truth project with pristine demo + modern dev environment.

scripts.flagships:seed: node scripts/seed-remaining-flagships.mjs && npm run flagships:apply && npm run flagships:stamp
scripts.deploy:verify: npm run build && echo 'Build OK — commit dist/ and push to origin main for Cloudflare Pages deploy'
scripts.//deploy: Staged: build → purge CF cache → wrangler pages deploy → wait-live verify (Playwright)
scripts.deploy: npm run build && node scripts/purge-live-cache.mjs && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name=motopass --branch=main --commit-dirty=true && node scripts/wait-live-app.mjs
scripts.deploy:safe: npm run build && echo 'Deploying ONLY to motopass (motopass.giveabit.io)' && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name=motopass --branch=main
scripts.deploy:check: test -n "$CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN" && echo 'CF token set' || echo 'Set CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN in .env.local for manual wrangler deploy'
scripts.deploy:all: npm run validate:data && npm run validate:stamps && npm run validate:seal && LAUNCH_SKIP_OPS=1 LAUNCH_WRITE_ONLY=1 npm run launch:gate && npm run lint && npm test && npm run build && npm run bundle:check && npm run test:e2e && npm run deploy:safe
